name: Meow Serial AI Route From s.mpas.top
purpose: A shortest-path guide for a new AI that receives only the site URL and must understand, generate, test, and explain Meow Serial protocol JSON.
route_principle: Start from the public website, discover machine-readable AI files, identify the protocol shape, generate declarative protocol JSON, test it in the Protocol page, and only then recommend source-code parser work.

ai_should_infer: This is not a generic serial terminal.
The primary task is custom protocol parsing through importable JSON profiles.
The AI should read the public AI routes before asking the user for protocol details.
The AI should output direct-import JSON only when enough protocol information is available.

route.name: Open the site root
route.goal: Find visible product identity and AI links.
route.expected_signal: The page describes Meow Serial as a custom protocol parser workspace.

route.name: Read natural-language AI overview
route.goal: Learn the core task, protocol kinds, and safety boundary.
route.expected_signal: The file says Meow Serial is not a generic serial terminal and points to protocol JSON.

route.name: Read machine manifest
route.goal: Collect stable endpoints, selector maps, examples, and prompt templates.
route.expected_signal: The manifest exposes custom_protocol_json, protocol_profile, and browser_automation.

route.name: Read runtime API
route.goal: Confirm current runtime capabilities and the canonical command surface.
route.expected_signal: agentReadiness.grade is S and customProtocolJsonContract is present.

route.name: Read custom parser primer
route.goal: Avoid misclassifying the app and decide whether the user's data can be a protocol profile.
route.expected_signal: The AI can explain line-values, json-lines, and tlv.

route.name: Read extension policy
route.goal: Keep protocol JSON declarative and decide when embedded-side normalization or reviewed source parser code is needed.
route.expected_signal: The AI refuses to embed executable parser code inside protocol JSON.

route.name: Read protocol schema
route.goal: Generate a direct-import JSON object that matches Meow Serial's profile shape.
route.expected_signal: The generated profile uses kind line-values, json-lines, or tlv.

route.name: Read browser automation guide
route.goal: Operate the site with data-ai selectors instead of localized visible text.
route.expected_signal: The AI knows how to open /serial?tab=protocol and read protocol-test-output.

route.name: Use the operation playbook
route.goal: Execute the import/test/save route or report missing information.
route.expected_signal: The AI can either test a sample or ask the user for the missing protocol fields.

decision_order.choose_when: Records are text lines with separated numeric values.
Records are one JSON object per line.
Packets have readable packet length and TLV type/length headers, with target values at fixed payload offsets.
must_ask_for: sample hex frame and expected decoded values

output_rules: Return exactly one JSON object for direct import.
Do not wrap direct-import JSON in Markdown.
Do not include executable parser code.
Use decimal numbers, not JavaScript expressions.
Use stable channel labels because they become dashboard channel names.

browser_operation_route.success_signal: protocol-test-output contains expected labels and finite numeric values.

workspace_json_route.success_signal: [data-ai^="canvas-widget-"] exists and sidebar channels show finite values.

file_send_route.safety_rule: Sending a file writes to the selected connected device; confirm user intent before starting.

fallbacks.condition: The user has no hardware connected.
The protocol needs checksum, byte stuffing, variable offsets, compression, arrays, matrices, bitfields, or cross-packet calculations.
fallbacks.action: Recommend firmware-side normalization to JSON Lines/line-values/simple TLV, or a reviewed source-code parser module.

fallbacks.condition: The AI cannot use browser automation.
fallbacks.action: Report the browser limitation honestly and still generate/test protocol JSON mentally against the schema and examples.

short_answer_template: I will read https://s.mpas.top, identify the protocol shape, generate a declarative Meow Serial protocol JSON profile, and test it through /serial?tab=protocol. If the protocol cannot fit line-values/json-lines/tlv, I will recommend embedded-side normalization or a reviewed source parser instead.
